name: DNC War Room
subject: re: Betsy DeVos
body:
Betsy DeVos is completely unqualified to be Secretary of Education.
---
**Add your name: stand with Democrats against Betsy DeVos.

** **[ADD YOUR NAME](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Stop-DeVos1?keycode=&firstname=\(null\)&lastname=\(null\)&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+ADD+YOUR+NAME&utm_campaign=em_20170204_dnc_nd&source=em_20170204_dnc_nd")**
Friend --

On Monday, the Senate will hold the final vote to confirm Betsy DeVos as the Secretary of Education.

Our education system needs a leader who understands the system, someone who cares about the future of our children in public schools and beyond. Betsy DeVos has never attended a public school, worked in a public school, or sent her kids to public schools, and she devoted her career to tearing down public education. So how can we trust that she will put the interest of students before her own? We simply can't, **[and that's why she should not be the next Secretary of Education.](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c7fe/4067b0a/2c3a2dc3b/7e7b8077/3741334383/VEsE/ "http://my.democrats.org/Stop-DeVos?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+and+thats+why+she+should+not+be+the+next&utm_campaign=em_20170204_dnc_nd&source=em_20170204_dnc_nd")**

All 48 Senate Democrats and two Republicans have said that they will be voting "NO." There needs to be one more Republican to vote "NO" to Betsy DeVos, and her nomination will then be nothing more than a distant, scary memory.

**Stand with Democrats today. Add your name to say that Betsy DeVos is not the right person for the job and call on more Senate Republicans to reject her:

** **[ADD YOUR NAME](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Stop-DeVos1?keycode=&firstname=\(null\)&lastname=\(null\)&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3+-+ADD+YOUR+NAME&utm_campaign=em_20170204_dnc_nd&source=em_20170204_dnc_nd")**
Thanks,

DNC War Room

Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington DC 20003 and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c7fe/4067b0a/2c3a2dc3b/7e7b8075/3741334383/VEsC/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/user/manage?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=4+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20170204_dnc_nd&source=em_20170204_dnc_nd"). Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c7fe/4067b0a/2c3a2dc3b/7e7b8072/3741334383/VEsD/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=5+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170204_dnc_nd&source=em_20170204_dnc_nd"). Click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c7fe/4067b0a/2c3a2dc3b/7e7b8073/3741334383/VEsA/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=6+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170204_dnc_nd&source=em_20170204_dnc_nd") to unsubscribe from our supporter list, but if you leave, it will be harder for you to stay involved in the organization that you've been such a critical part of. This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c7fe/4067b0a/2c3a2dc3b/7e7b8070/3741334383/VEsB/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=7+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170204_dnc_nd&source=em_20170204_dnc_nd"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting our party.

name: staff@maggiehassan.com
subject: Betsy DeVos Op-Ed (The New York Times) >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdd08/2a380d31/1410c3b6/fed7ce/3851859373/VEsH/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdd08/2a380d31/1410c3b6/fed7ce/3851859373/VEsE/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
Hello,
President Trump's nominee for Secretary of Education, Betsy DeVos, is expected to advance to a final confirmation vote on Tuesday.
Democrats -- and some Republicans -- are acting on very real concerns that Mrs. DeVos is unfit to fill this role, and Senator Hassan has emerged as a leader in the opposition to the nominee.
Under questioning from Senator Hassan, Mrs. DeVos admitted that she was confused about whether the Individuals with Disabilities Act was a federal law, and she has demonstrated a complete lack of experience in, knowledge of and support for public education.
With the future of our public schools on the line, Senator Hassan penned an Op-Ed for _The New York Times_ about the main reasons that she will be voting "NO" on Betsy DeVos:
> _Our nation recognized early in its history that public education is a necessary foundation for a democracy. It's critical that we continue to support a strong public education system that prepares our young people, all of them, to participate in our democracy and compete on a fair footing in the work force.
>
> For this reason, our public officials should share a reverence for the importance of public education to our country's success, both now and in the future. And they must show a commitment to enforcing our laws so that all students have the opportunity to succeed.
>
> That is why I oppose President Trump's nominee for secretary of education, Betsy DeVos._
[**We hope that you will take the time to read the Op-Ed in its entirety.**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdd08/2a380d31/1410c3b6/fed7cf/3851859373/VEsF/ "https://www.nytimes.com/2017/02/03/opinion/why-i-wont-vote-for-betsy-devos.html?_r=0")
Senator Hassan has long been a tireless advocate for quality, accessible public education for everyone, and we on Team Maggie join her in encouraging one more Republican senator to break with the president and vote against this woefully unqualified nominee.
Thank you for everything you do,
Team Maggie

[Contribute](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdd08/2a380d31/1410c3b6/fed7c8/3851859373/VEsC/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX2dlbmVyYWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDE3MDIwNF9EZVZvc09wRWRfYWxsIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjMsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_general?refcode=e20170204_DeVosOpEd_all&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
To unsubscribe from the Maggie for NH email list, please click here: [Unsubscribe](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdd08/2a380d31/1410c3b6/fed7c9/3851859373/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "http://act.maggiehassan.com/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")
